features: Includes bonus Anti-Stain Toothbrush and Dental Flosser Toothpicks
description: Product Description White Glo Coffee & Tea Drinkers Formula Whitening Toothpaste is a revolutionary toothpaste with Micro Polishing Particles to target discolouration and yellowing on the tooth enamel caused by consumption of coffee and tea over time. White Glo's exclusive Micro- Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush and brush teeth for two minutes. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. See more
